name: KRN_KMALLOC_CUSTOM_FIRST_HEAP
help:
Custom first kmalloc heap size
When OFF (the default), kmalloc's first heap is sized
automatically: 64 KB if KRN_TINY_KERNEL is ON, 128 KB
otherwise. Turn ON to set an explicit size via the
sub-option that appears below.

name: KRN_KMALLOC_FIRST_HEAP_SIZE_KB
help:
First kmalloc heap size (KB)
Must be a multiple of 64. Only used when
KRN_KMALLOC_CUSTOM_FIRST_HEAP is ON
 otherwise the
derived 'auto' value applies.

name: KRN_BIG_IO_BUF
help: Use a larger buffer for I/O

name: KRN_TERM_SCROLL_LINES
help: Lines to scroll on Shift+PgUp / Shift+PgDown

name: KRN_PRINTK_ON_CURR_TTY
help: Always flush printk() on the current TTY

name: KRN_SYMBOLS
help:
Keep kernel symbol tables in the image
Needed for readable backtraces and kernel self-tests.

name: KRN_PAGE_FAULT_PRINTK
help: Print info when killing a process on page fault

name: KRN_NO_SYS_WARN
help: Warn on calls to not-implemented syscalls

name: KRN_MAX_HANDLES
help: Max open handles per process (keep small)

name: KRN_MINIMAL_TIME_SLICE
help:
Use 1-tick time slice (stress test)
Forces the scheduler's time slice to a single tick to
trigger more race conditions in testing. Not meant for
production builds. Overrides KRN_SCHED_LATENCY_TICKS and
KRN_MIN_GRANULARITY_TICKS, pinning both to 1.

name: KRN_SCHED_LATENCY_TICKS
help:
Target scheduling latency in ticks
Each RUNNABLE task gets to run for SCHED_LATENCY_TICKS /
nr_running ticks before preemption, clamped at
KRN_MIN_GRANULARITY_TICKS. Default 20 at the default
KRN_TIMER_HZ=250 is 80 ms -- the 2-task case yields a
10-tick (40 ms) slice, matching pre-CFS-step-7 fixed-
slice behavior. Higher values trade preemption latency
for cache locality under light load.

name: KRN_MIN_GRANULARITY_TICKS
help:
Floor under SCHED_LATENCY_TICKS / nr_running
Caps how short the per-task slice can shrink under heavy
load. Default 2 at the default KRN_TIMER_HZ=250 is 8 ms
-- still well above context-switch cost.

name: KRN_HANG_DETECTION
help:
Compile in the hang detector and per-task state dumper
Adds a forward-progress watchdog inside the optional
sched-alive thread (see -sat / KERNEL_SAT). When the
scheduler stops doing context switches for an interval,
the watchdog dumps every task's state, the wait object
each one is parked on, the open pipe fds, and a per-pipe
ring of recent dup/close events. Useful for diagnosing
stress-test hangs (lost wakeups, missed broadcasts,
scheduler wedges)
 off by default because of the small
but always-on per-pipe accounting cost.

name: KRN_STACK_ISOLATION
help: Isolate the kernel stack in high virtual memory

name: KRN_TINY_KERNEL
help:
Force minimal kernel size (advanced)
Makes the Tilck kernel as small as possible. Incompatible
with many modules (console, fb, tracing, ...) and several
kernel options like KERNEL_SELFTESTS. Use carefully.

name: FAT_TEST_DIR
help: Add a test dir with many files to the FAT32 initrd

name: EFI_BOOTLOADER_DEBUG
help:
Early DEBUG dialog in EFI bootloader
See docs/debugging.md. Only meaningful when the EFI
bootloader is being built.

name: BOOTLOADER_POISON_MEMORY
help: Poison all available memory in the bootloader

name: TYPICAL_DEVEL_USERAPPS
help: Include kernel-testing dev apps in the ramdisk

name: USERAPPS_CFLAGS
help: Build flags for C/C++ user programs

name: FORK_NO_COW
help: fork(): full memory copy instead of copy-on-write

name: MMAP_NO_COW
help: mmap(): allocate real memory instead of zero-page + COW

name: KRN32_LIN_VADDR
help: Place the 32-bit kernel at the default linear mapping

name: SERIAL_CON_IN_VIDEO_MODE
help: Also open /dev/ttyS0 console in video mode

name: KERNEL_SERCON
help:
Use serial as the only console
Forces the kernel to boot with the serial console as the
primary (and only) console, even when a video console
module is available.

name: DEBUG_CHECKS
help: Keep ASSERTs + debug checks in release builds

name: PANIC_SHOW_STACKTRACE
help: Show the stacktrace on kernel panic

name: PANIC_SHOW_REGS
help: Show register contents on kernel panic

name: KERNEL_UBSAN
help: Enable UBSAN instrumentation in the kernel

name: KERNEL_SAT
help: Enable the sched-alive thread at boot (CI runs)

name: PS2_DO_SELFTEST
help: Run PS/2 controller selftests in init_kb()

name: INIT_REPORT_PROC_EXIT
help: Report child-process exits on init's TTY

name: KERNEL_SYSCC
help: Use system compiler instead of the toolchain's

name: KERNEL_FORCE_TC_ISYSTEM
help:
Force toolchain sysroot with a system compiler (DANGEROUS)
Only meant for static-analysis builds. Brutally forces the
build system to use the toolchain sysroot for system
headers even when a system compiler is in use.

name: KRN_FBCON_BIGFONT_THR
help:
Cols threshold to switch to 16x32 fb_console font
When the screen has more columns than this threshold,
fb_console switches from the default 8x16 font to a
16x32 font.

name: KRN_FB_CONSOLE_BANNER
help: Show a banner at the top of fb_console

name: KRN_FB_CONSOLE_FAILSAFE_OPT
help: Optimize fb_console failsafe mode for old machines

name: KRN_PCI_VENDORS_LIST
help: Compile-in the full PCI vendors list
